历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 1660 → 1932 → 2912 → 1747 → 1701. In 2023, there was a noticeable backward shift (2912), but from 2024 to 2025, it quickly stabilized around 1700, showing a slight forward trend in recent two years, with a baseline of about 1701 in 2025. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 82 → 82 → 80 → 80 → 81, basically stable in the 80–82 range. In 2026, the plan is 69 students, a decrease of 12 from 2025 (a reduction of about 14.8%), which is a significant contraction that will intensify competition and push rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 8th from 2021 to 2024, dropping to 9th in 2025–2026, but still firmly among the top universities in China. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is generally positive, mainly involving school management responses and dormitory cafeterias (ranked first nationally for cafeterias), with no negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 22nd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications. No obvious admission gaps or breaks have been recorded. It has 17 A- or above disciplines, including Mechanical Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, and Clinical Medicine A-, with outstanding engineering strength, strongly attracting Physics Category applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other advantageous majors at HUST are all highly recommended directions, with continuously increasing popularity. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Chongqing is 209,000. Estimated Physics Category proportion based on recent years is about 65.5%, approximately 136,895 people, a slight decrease from 139,478 in 2025, slightly reducing the competition base. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with relatively strong regional appeal to Chongqing applicants. Its enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025), at a moderate level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1701, the significant 14.8% reduction in Physics Category enrollment in 2026 will intensify competition, the positive school reputation and high popularity of advantageous majors, and the slight decrease in the number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1530, with a range of 1480–1580.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 华中科技大学在重庆市医学类单独招生，2021-2025年最低录取位次分别为956名（计划10人）、1055名（计划10人）、1173名（计划12人）、4079名（计划11人）、2337名（计 划13人）。2024年因新高考改革首年，位次大幅波动至4079名，2025年迅速回升至2337名，显示医学类报考热度恢复。2026年医学类招生计划为9人（临床医学五年制7人、临床医 学八年制2人），较2025年的13人减少4人，缩招幅度约30.8%，招生专业也由2025年的临床医学、口腔医学、临床医学八年制缩减为仅临床医学类，口腔医学专业取消。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家『985工程』和『211工程』重点建设高校，入选『双一流』建设高校（A类）。其同济医学院历史悠久，临床医学学科实力雄厚 ，在医学领域享有极高声誉，对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续攀升，临床医学作为核心专业竞争尤为激烈。华中科技大学同济医学院位于武汉，地处华中地区中心城市，医疗资源丰富，对重庆市考生具有较 强吸引力。2026年医学类仅保留临床医学（五年制）和临床医学（八年制）两个专业，专业结构精简，但缩招幅度较大，预计竞争将进一步加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型计算及历年位次趋势分析，预测2026年华中科技大学在重庆市医学类最低录取位次约为1876名，波动区间为1756-1996名。2026年医学类大幅缩招是位次上升（ 更难进）的核心驱动因素，同时医学报考热度持续高位，预计录取难度较2025年有所增加。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology conducts separate enrollment for medicine in Chongqing. From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings were 956 (plan 10), 1055 (plan 10), 1173 (plan 12), 4079 (plan 11), and 2337 (plan 13). In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking fluctuated significantly to 4079, but quickly rebounded to 2337 in 2025, indicating a recovery in the popularity of medical programs. In 2026, the enrollment plan for medicine is 9 (7 for clinical medicine five-year program, 2 for clinical medicine eight-year program), a decrease of 4 from 13 in 2025, a reduction of about 30.8%. The enrollment majors have also been reduced from clinical medicine, stomatology, and clinical medicine eight-year program in 2025 to only clinical medicine categories, with the stomatology major canceled.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university in the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and selected as a 'Double First-Class' construction university (Class A). Its Tongji Medical College has a long history, strong clinical medicine disciplines, and enjoys a very high reputation in the medical field, continuously attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with clinical medicine as a core major facing particularly fierce competition. Huazhong University of Science and Technology's Tongji Medical College is located in Wuhan, a central city in the central region of China, with abundant medical resources, which strongly attracts candidates from Chongqing. In 2026, only two majors, clinical medicine (five-year) and clinical medicine (eight-year), will be retained in the medical category, streamlining the major structure, but the significant reduction in enrollment is expected to further intensify competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive supply-demand elasticity model calculation and analysis of historical ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Chongqing's medical category in 2026 will be approximately 1876, with a fluctuation range of 1756-1996. The significant reduction in medical enrollment in 2026 is the core driving factor for the ranking increase (harder to enter), while the popularity of medical applications remains high, so the admission difficulty is expected to increase compared to 2025.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Chongqing's medical category only enrolls for two majors: clinical medicine (five-year) and clinical medicine (eight-year), with no traditional tier 3 safe-choice major. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to target clinical medicine (five-year) as the main goal and clinical medicine (eight-year) as a stretch goal.
